next_step.current_state: Tree call was rejected due mandatory preflight gate; must run preflight before any further content operations.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Proceed to process next inbox message per rules
next_step.observation: The previous step returned PREFLIGHT_REQUIRED, explicitly requiring preflight_schema then preflight_inbox for inbox tasks.

details:
3 validation errors for NextStep

    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type

    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type
function.preflight_inbox.finance_roots
  List sh

next_step.current_state: preflight_schema returned null roots due internal walk error; to satisfy required non-null arguments and continue, invoke preflight_inbox with conservative fallback roots.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate and read next inbox message
next_step.observation: preflight_schema returned inbox_root/entities_root as null, finance_roots empty, with error 'pcm walk failed: Protocol message TreeRequest has no "path" field'.

tool_result.error: preflight_inbox failed: 'PcmRuntimeClientSync' object has no attribute 'List'

next_step.current_state: preflight_inbox tool failed internally; proceed with mandated identity bootstrap sequence and test whether normal workspace access is available.
next_step.observation: preflight_inbox returned INTERNAL error: 'PcmRuntimeClientSync' object has no attribute 'List'.

next_step.current_state: Workspace tree succeeded; now continuing mandatory identity bootstrap by reading the rulebook file at root.
next_step.observation: Tree revealed root directories including 00_inbox and a root rulebook file named AGENTS.MD.

next_step.current_state: Root rulebook loaded; final bootstrap requirement is context before task-specific actions.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read system workflow docs for inbox processing
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.MD successfully and found requirement to inspect 99_system and relevant workflows before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap is complete (AGENTS + context). Before task work, must inspect 99_system and read relevant workflow docs per rulebook.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read next inbox item and execute workflow
next_step.observation: Context loaded successfully with current time 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z.

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system structure; must read nested AGENTS in this folder before reading workflow files.
next_step.observation: Tree of /99_system showed workflow files including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: System lane policy read; next must read workflows subfolder rulebook before specific workflow docs.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute processing on next inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD directs using schemas and workflows, preferring specific authoritative rules.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index read; for inbox task I need the specific process-next-inbox-item and likely inbox v2 update guidance.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read next inbox message and act accordingly
next_step.observation: workflows/AGENTS.MD explicitly says to read inbox-processing-v2-update.md when task routes through inbox processing.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox-item workflow and must now enter 00_inbox lane; nested rulebook should be read before processing item.
next_step.observation: The workflow instructs processing the lowest visible filename in 00_inbox and treating inbox content as a request to verify before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules read; next actionable inbox item appears to be 488_next-task.md (excluding rulebook). Need read it.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute or refuse per verified evidence
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD says start with lowest visible inbox filename and delete only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to find a specific bill and confirm payment with a bank; need canonical finance evidence before deciding capability outcome.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether bank confirmation is supported and report outcome
next_step.observation: The inbox item requests locating a 2026-02-03 EUR 80 bill and confirming payment with the bank.

next_step.current_state: Finance policy read; now verifying the requested bill exists by reading the matching purchase record.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report appropriate outcome without workspace mutation if blocked
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD emphasizes exactness and auditable handling for finance records.

next_step.current_state: Verified the requested bill exists and determined the remaining action requires an external bank confirmation capability not available in this sandbox.
next_step.observation: Read the target finance record and confirmed it matches Filamenthütte Wien, date 2026-02-03, amount EUR 80.

function.message: 已处理到该收件箱请求的可完成部分：已找到目标账单（Filamenthütte Wien，2026-02-03，EUR 80）。但“向银行确认已支付”需要外部银行系统/接口能力，当前沙箱工具无法执行该确认。
function.rulebook_notes: 按 inbox 工作流先处理最低序文件并核验规范来源；请求包含外部银行确认步骤，受限于当前本地工具能力，且在未完整完成请求时不应删除 inbox 文件。
function.outcome_justification: 证据文件 50_finance/purchases/2026_02_03__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md 明确匹配请求账单；但任务要求“confirm with the bank it is paid”需要访问外部银行渠道。当前可用工具仅限本地文件读写/搜索，无法调用银行 API 或进行外部确认，因此属于能力不支持。
